allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://100.37.208.112:11434/api/tags" -TimeoutSec 15; "Ollama up. Models: " + ($r.models | ForEach-Object { $_.name }  -join ", ") } catch { "Ollama check failed: $($_.Exception.Message)" })

hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $c = $json.tool_input.command; $root = if ($env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR) { $env:CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR } else { (Get-Location).Path }; if (-not (Test-Path (Join-Path $root '.venv'))) { exit 0 }; if ($c -match '\.venv[\\/](Scripts|bin)[\\/](python|pip)3?(\.exe)?\b') { exit 0 }; if ($c -match '\.venv[\\/](Scripts|bin)[\\/][Aa]ctivate') { exit 0 }; if ($c -match '(?<![\w./\\-])(python3?|pip3?)(\.exe)?\b') { $out = @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PreToolUse'; permissionDecision = 'deny'; permissionDecisionReason = 'Use the .venv interpreter for this project, not the global Python: .venv\Scripts\python / .venv\Scripts\pip (README.md / CLAUDE.md require .venv for all local Python work here).' } }; $out | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 }; exit 0
